title: MCMedieval
description: A lightweight medieval-inspired modpack focused on performance, immersion, and quality-of-life improvements.
body:
# 🛡️ MCMedieval

**MCMedieval** is a lightweight, performance-optimized Fabric modpack for **Minecraft 1.21.1** that brings a **medieval-inspired experience** to the game. It enhances vanilla survival with **immersive visuals, medieval-themed content, and essential quality-of-life improvements**, all while maintaining smooth performance.

---

## ✨ Key Features

### ⚔️ Medieval Atmosphere
- Epic Knights mod for medieval combat and equipment
- Immersive 3D skin layers and eating animations
- Visual particle effects with Visuality
- Chat Heads for a more engaging interface

### 🚀 Performance & Optimization
- Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore for smooth performance
- Entity Culling, More Culling, ImmediatelyFast, Dynamic FPS

### 🎮 Quality of Life Improvements
- JEI for recipe viewing
- AppleSkin for food information
- Freecam and Zoomify
- Mod Menu for easy management
- No Chat Reports for safer multiplayer gameplay

### 🗺️ Exploration Tools
- Xaero’s Minimap and World Map for better navigation

### 🎨 Graphics & Shaders
- Iris Shader support
- Sodium Extra for enhanced rendering

---

## ⚙️ Technical Info
- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.1  
- **Mod Loader:** Fabric  
- **Stable & lightweight** for both singleplayer and multiplayer

---

MCMedieval was originally created for a friend but is now shared with the community, offering a **vanilla-friendly yet immersive medieval experience**.
